portableMode.title: Portable Mode
portableMode.description: Stores installed plugins and scripts in the data folder next to aviutl2.exe.

packageState.title: Send anonymous usage statistics
packageState.description: To improve app recommendations, anonymously send installed and uninstalled package IDs along with the currently installed package IDs.
